lens-trace.name: Lens Trace
lens-trace.description: Real-time task execution visibility during speckit implement runs: current task, intended files, and change summary.
lens-trace.author: josechudev

lens-drift.name: Lens Drift
lens-drift.description: Per-task spec adherence guard: diffs generated code against its spec section after each implement task and flags violations.
lens-drift.author: josechudev

lens-humanize.name: Lens Humanize
lens-humanize.description: Translates the agent-oriented plan.md into PR-sized chunks with ownership signals, visible dependencies, and entry/exit criteria.
lens-humanize.author: josechudev

lens-compress.name: Lens Compress
lens-compress.description: Applies semantic compression to speckit artifacts (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md) before implement runs to reduce token consumption.
lens-compress.author: josechudev

lens-contract.name: Lens Contract
lens-contract.description: Conversational contract generation from OpenAPI specs or JSON schemas. Asks targeted questions and writes .specify/contracts/ files.
lens-contract.author: josechudev

lens-probe.name: Lens Probe
lens-probe.description: Validates ADK response stream JSON against a contract in .specify/contracts/. Reports violations with event index and rule reference.
lens-probe.author: josechudev
